title: Sonic The Hedgehog Arts & Crafts Set for Kids, 34 Pcs Colouring & Art Supplies, Crayons Pencils Notepad & Accessories, Stationary Supplies for Kids
features: Official Sonic Merchandise - Looking for gaming merch for kids? This art set for kids is officially licensed Sonic the Hedgehog merchandise and includes everything kids need to create vibrant drawings

Art Set Contents - This boys colouring set boasts 3 tiers filled with crayons, colouring pencils, a felt tip pen set, a 10 page notepad, eraser, HB pencil and more! See images for the full contents on this epic childrens art set

Sonic Kids Colouring Sets - Keep your little gamer entertained with these colouring sets for children. Brimming full with all the art supplies they could need to provide hours of creative fun and entertainment

Encourage Creative Learning - This art set for children is ideal for learning and development as it provides a range of tools to experiment with different techniques, colours and textures. All stored neatly in a 3-tiered carry case

Sonic Gifts for Boys - Looking for a gift for a young Sonic fan? These art sets make a great gift for Christmas, birthdays or special occasions and are sure to go down a treat with any young gamer who enjoys being creative
description: Product Description Sonic Colouring Set for Kids If you're looking for a fun and creative way to keep your child entertained, this Sonic children's art set is an excellent choice. The comprehensive set comes in a convenient carry case and includes everything your child could need to unleash their inner artist. Sonic Gifts for Kids Surprise your little Sonic fan with the ideal gift – the Sonic colouring set! Watch their eyes light up as they bring Sonic and friends to life on paper, creating lasting memories through the magic of art. Official Sonic Merchandise Introducing the official Sonic colouring set for kids – the ultimate artistic experience! Dive into the world of official Sonic merchandise and let your child's creativity run wild with this epic art set! The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup.
